General.Name: Sunshine Ins Grp Co Ltd
General.Description: Sunshine Insurance Group Company Limited provides various insurance products and related services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Life Insurance, Property and Casualty Insurance, and Other Businesses segments. The company offers life, health, and accident insurance products; property and casualty insurance products comprising automobile, accident, short-term health, guarantee, liability, agriculture, and commercial property insurance products. It also provides credit and guarantee insurance, and asset management services. The company was formerly known as Sunshine Insurance Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sunshine Insurance Group Company Limited in 2007. Sunshine Insurance Group Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 40/F, Dah Sing Financial Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
